title: taraxacum atlanticola
intro: Taraxacum atlanticola, also known as the Atlantic dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The Atlantic dandelion is said to have several health benefits, such as supporting liver function, improving digestion, and reducing oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum atlanticola include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its potential health benefits.
